fix/hook-tails — shipped summary

Playground companion to index.html: what actually landed, with real numbers.

1. skill-cc-features fix (root cause)

audit-activation was flipped to user-invocable: true without an argument-hint, breaking test-skill-cc-features.sh. Fix: added argument-hint: "[--json]" to the frontmatter — not a test exemption.

2. eval:static fix (root cause)

test-skill-md.sh pins user-invocable/internal skill counts; the same flip made the pins stale. Re-pinned to 34 user-invocable / 80 internal. npm run eval:static: Failed: 0.

3. Field-aware Release-Please File Guard

release-please-guard.yml now only flags a governed JSON extra-file when the governed field (jsonpath, e.g. $.version) changes vs the merge base — routine content edits (like the hooks count in the manifest description) no longer need an override label. Generic extra-files stay whole-file governed. Documented in .claude/rules/count-sync.md.

4. audit-activation TIER-1 eval

RunEval 1Eval 2Eval 3Aggregate
Run 1 (as-committed)3/40/4 (blank generation)3/354% PARTIAL
Run 2 (after fixes)4/44/4 (retry caught the blank gen)3/3100% PASS

Two targeted fixes: (a) the eval runner now retries on blank (whitespace-only) generations, not just zero-byte files — a "\n"-only transcript previously graded every assertion FAIL; (b) SKILL.md hard-requires the literal telemetry path .claude/logs/subagent-spawns.jsonl in the report's data-source line (the grader failed a paraphrase).
